title: Benji's Better Tools
description: Adds some new tools that enhance gameplay
body:
# 4 New Types of Tools
Hammers
- Hammers can break pickaxeable blocks in a 3x3 area in any direction.

Paxels
- Paxels function as a Pickaxe, an Axe, and a Shovel all in one.

Scythes
- Scythes till the ground in a 3x3 area, as well as dealing massive damage with a high attack cooldown.

Lumber Axes
- Lumber Axes break a certain amount of connected logs depending on the tier, perfect for cutting down entire trees! Keep away from your house.

# 2 Utility Tools
Glass Chipper
- The Glass Chipper allows the user to break glass-like blocks much faster, as well as dropping the blocks without silk touch.

Bedrock Smasher
- Using the Bedrock Smasher on Bedrock will weaken it enough to be mined by a high level pickaxe.

# New Enchantment
Reaping
- Levels 1-4, allows Scythes to do increased damage


# Textures
Special thanks to [McAceJr](https://modrinth.com/user/McAceJr) for some of the textures
